build.stdout:
rm -rf main main.o utils.o

nvcc  -std=c++17 -Xcompiler -Wall -arch=sm_89 -O3 -c main.cu -o main.o
nvcc  -std=c++17 -Xcompiler -Wall -arch=sm_89 -O3 -c utils.cu -o utils.o
nvcc  -std=c++17 -Xcompiler -Wall -arch=sm_89 -O3 main.o utils.o -o main

correctness.stdout:
input:	../deredundancy-sycl/testData.fasta
output:	result.fasta
threshold:	0.95
word length:	7
reads count:	10000
Device offload time 13.557056 secs 
cluster count: 1357

verification.details: Pattern 'cluster count:\s+\d+' matched. Program outputs cluster count on successful completion
